column1: # RAK WisMesh Tap V2 TFT touch firmware - custom partition table.
# 16 MB layout with TWO EQUAL OTA app slots (same app region as T-Deck touch).
# Data region aligned with lilygo_tdeck/partitions_tdeck_touch.csv so the map
# tab's dedicated LittleFS "tiles" partition mounts and first-boot SPIFFS format
#   - tiles 4.75 MB LittleFS (subtype 0x83) for map tile cache
#   - spiffs 3.375 MB for prefs / contacts / chat history
